name: auditcov
description: AuditCov tracks objective source-code read coverage for Codex security audits.

interface.shortDescription: Track objective read coverage for code audits.
interface.longDescription: AuditCov adds a local MCP server and Codex skill for tracking which source-code lines were returned to the model during an audit. It groups coverage by project root and thread, and keeps coverage separate from security completeness.
defaultPrompt: Use AuditCov to audit this repo until read coverage reaches 80%.
Use AuditCov to track objective read coverage for this module.
